name: Ala Elegance Limousine & Trans
recent_news: No public web presence or news found; appears to be a micro livery/limousine operator in St. Louis with no visible school district contracts.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. ~6 employees, ~$395K revenue, no fleet/route presence. Not a viable Summit tuck-in; possible NEMT/ambulette only.

name: County Exec Taxi & Car Svc
recent_news: Micro taxi/livery operator in University City/St. Louis area; no school district contracts or M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Not a school bus contractor. Taxi/car service with 6 employees. Not a viable Summit School Services tuck-in target.

name: Dynasty Limousine Svc
recent_news: Small St. Petersburg limousine company; a similarly named Dynasty Transportation LLC markets airport/corporate/school/university shuttle service but no evidence of yellow-bus school district contracts.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Micro limo/livery; no fleet of yellow buses or special-needs route contracts identified. Not a Summit tuck-in.

name: Jerusalem Luxury Limousine Inc
recent_news: No public web presence found; Clearwater-area micro limousine operator with no school transportation footprint.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Luxury limo service with ~6 employees. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Lonnies Limousine Inc
recent_news: Florida corp filing P95000036420 (incorporated 1995); USDOT 1502491 registered May 2006 as a Limos & Shuttles passenger carrier. No school bus / SPED contract activity found.
fit_notes: Not a school bus operator. Small limo/shuttle company classified by FMCSA as Limos & Shuttles. Not a viable Summit School Services tuck-in target.
